query: SELECT id, name, email, openId, loginMethod, tenantId, role, teamRole, isTenantAdmin, createdAt, lastSignedIn FROM users WHERE email LIKE '%alvarez%' OR email LIKE '%lozano%' OR name LIKE '%Daniel Lozano%';
